Proposal.title: Proposal
Proposal.description: A design proposal or idea submitted by a community member to be voted on

title.description: The title of the proposal, must be concise and informative

description.description: A brief description explaining the proposal

authorId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the community member who submitted it

authorName.description: The display name of the author

authorEmail.description: The email of the author who submitted it

upvotesCount.description: The total number of upvotes received

downvotesCount.description: The total number of downvotes received

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this proposal was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this proposal was last updated

category.description: The selected category of the proposal

tags.description: A collection of tags reflecting the specific scope of the proposal

priorityScore.description: The computed score for search priority, usually equal to netVotes

status.description: The lifecycle status of this proposal which determines voting outcomes

durationDays.description: The duration picked by the author for public voting in days (1, 3, 7, 14, or 30)

expiresAt.description: The date-time when the active voting window closes

Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: A single user's vote (up or down) on a specific proposal

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the voter

voterName.description: The display name of the voter for transparency

voteType.description: The choice: 'up' for upvote, 'down' for downvote

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last vote update

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A community comment or threaded reply in response to a proposal

proposalId.description: The ID of the proposal this comment belongs to

parentId.description: The ID of the parent comment, or null for top-level comments

content.description: The markdown-formatted text content of the comment

authorId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the comment author

authorName.description: The display name of the author

upvotes.description: Total upvotes received by this comment

downvotes.description: Total downvotes received by this comment

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this comment was created

isInsightful.description: True if the original proposal author marked this comment as insightful

CommentVote.title: CommentVote
CommentVote.description: An individual's upvote or downvote cast on a comment

User.title: User
User.description: The public profile containing the accumulated reputation and streaks of a community member

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the community member

displayName.description: The display name of the community member

email.description: The verified email of the commenter or voter

reputation.description: The aggregate reputation score earned by public activities

badges.description: A list of automatically awarded honors and badges

streak.description: The active daily voting streak count of this user

joinedAt.description: The signup timestamp of this user

lastVotedDate.description: The calendar date formatted as YYYY-MM-DD on which this user last voted

emailDigest.description: User preference for email summary updates

webhookUrl.description: Secure callback webhook url for autonomous agents

lastVisit.description: Timestamp of the user's last interactive visit

isAgent.description: True if user is an agent

isVerifiedAgent.description: True if user is verified as an agent

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification alert pushed to a user regarding activity in the goBodhi system

userId.description: The target UID receiving this notification

title.description: The title of the notification alert

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this notification was created

read.description: True if the user has marked this alert as read

type.description: Classification of notification category or styling

proposalId.description: The active proposal ID related to this notification if applicable

Delegation.title: Delegation
Delegation.description: A vote/reputation delegation from one user to another

delegatorId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user delegating their vote

delegatorName.description: The display name of the delegator

delegateId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user receiving the delegation

delegateName.description: The display name of the delegate

category.description: The category over which the delegation applies

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this delegation was created

Challenge.title: Challenge
Challenge.description: A community-focused competitive challenge created by moderators

/challenges/{challengeId}.description: Challenges that prompt the community to design solutions within specific bounds

/delegations/{delegationId}.description: A collection tracking active vote delegations from users to delegates

/users/{userId}.description: A collection storing credentials, public reputations, and leaderboard info for each member

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: A global collection storing all in-app notifications for users

/proposals/{proposalId}.description: A collection of proposals that are eligible for community voting

/proposals/{proposalId}/votes/{userId}.description: A subcollection tracking individual voter selections to prevent double voting

/comments/{commentId}.description: A global collection containing all threaded comments across all proposals
